steps.title: Supply the date and boundary
steps.content: The sentence needs the second completion date, 1712, and respectively to pair the two paintings with their two dates. After that, a new independent clause begins about allegorical art's popularity.

steps.title: Reject comma-splice options
steps.content: Choice B uses only a comma before the new independent clause. Choice C omits the second year. Choice D separates respectively from the date it modifies. The year, parenthetical comma, and semicolon are all needed. The answer is A.
